name: kopo
title: Kopo
description: Rephrase the selected text with Claude or ChatGPT (via Raycast Pro)
author: ioseb

preferences.name: oauthToken
preferences.title: Claude Token
preferences.description: Run `claude setup-token` in a terminal and paste the token here (uses your Claude subscription, no API key).

preferences.name: claudePath
preferences.title: Claude CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the `claude` binary (Claude Code), signed in with your subscription. Run `which claude` to find it.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model (optional)
preferences.description: Passed to `claude --model` (e.g. sonnet, opus). Blank = your Claude Code default.

commands.name: kopo
commands.title: Kopo
commands.description: Rephrase selected text and paste it back

commands.name: kopo-modal
commands.title: Kopo (Modal)
commands.description: Rephrase selected text and show it in a modal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
